_doc: Tree-sitter grammar suggestions consumed by `mustard install-grammars`. This catalogue is the source of truth for the CLI helper — Mustard NEVER downloads or compiles grammars, it only suggests the repo + shell command. Edit this file to add languages or override repos; the binary embeds this JSON at build time (see apps/cli/src/commands/install_grammars.rs::EMBEDDED_CATALOG) and also honours a per-project override at .claude/grammars-suggestions.json. Schema: each grammar has lang_id (matches tree_sitter_loader's language_name), label (human-facing), repo_url (HTTPS upstream), install_cmd (single-line shell snippet), manifest_signals (file patterns whose presence detects this language; '*' prefix means any file ending with the suffix), and implies (other lang_ids to surface alongside this one — typescript implies javascript because .ts files routinely live next to .js).

grammars.label: Rust
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-rust && cd tree-sitter-rust && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: TypeScript
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-typescript && cd tree-sitter-typescript/typescript && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: JavaScript
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-javascript && cd tree-sitter-javascript && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: Python
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-python && cd tree-sitter-python && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: Go
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-go && cd tree-sitter-go && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: C#
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c-sharp && cd tree-sitter-c-sharp && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: Java
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-java && cd tree-sitter-java && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: Ruby
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-ruby && cd tree-sitter-ruby && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: C++
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-cpp && cd tree-sitter-cpp && tree-sitter generate

grammars.label: C
grammars.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c && cd tree-sitter-c && tree-sitter generate
